title: Patintero: Ang alamat ni Meng Patalo
original_title: Patintero: Ang Alamat ni Meng Patalo
overview: A young neighbourhood underdog or a “patalo” who assembles an unlikely team of losers to join her in the ultimate battle for the streets: patintero.
